subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Threshold of the All-Bountiful! Every shadow save the shadow of Truth is darkness, and every fortress is frailer than the spider's web [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم آستان منّان ، هر ظلّی جز ظلّ حقّ يحموم است و هر حصنی اوهن از بيت عنکبوت
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @work as worship, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @excellence; distinction
